title: reholttumia inclusa
side_effects: Reholttumia inclusa can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Prolonged consumption of the plant's extracts may also lead to stomach problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Additionally, improper use of reholttumia inclusa may cause interactions with other medications, resulting in decreased effectiveness or increased toxicity. In severe cases, improper use of the plant may even lead to liver damage or kidney failure.
